title: Senatorial Campaign
description: Contested for the Senate on a transformative platform, advocating for educational reform, youth empowerment, and sustainable development policies.

title: Asikhia Towers Completion
description: Completed landmark 12-story commercial complex in Lagos, setting new standards for sustainable urban development in Nigeria.

title: National Excellence Award
description: Received the prestigious National Excellence Award in recognition of outstanding contributions to education, business, and national development.

title: Special Adviser Appointment
description: Appointed Special Adviser on Economic Matters, bringing academic rigor and business acumen to public policy formulation.

title: Heritage Garden Estate
description: Launched the 200-unit Heritage Garden Estate in Abuja, a model for modern, sustainable residential community development.

title: Education Foundation Launch
description: Founded the Asikhia Education Foundation, committing personal resources to scholarships, school development, and educational access.

title: Oxford Research Fellowship
description: Selected as Visiting Research Fellow at Oxford University, conducting groundbreaking research in educational policy and leadership.

title: Harvard Executive Education
description: Completed Executive Leadership Program at Harvard Kennedy School, enhancing skills in public policy and strategic leadership.

title: Doctorate Degree
description: Awarded PhD in Organizational Leadership, marking the culmination of extensive research and academic dedication.

title: Academic Career Begins
description: Began distinguished academic career as a lecturer, combining teaching excellence with groundbreaking research.
